arts.ttl: “He hasn’t been disrespectful” – Rio Ferdinand defends Mohamed Salah and fires warning to Liverpool
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Rio Ferdinand has commented on the Mohamed Salah transfer situation with a warning to Liverpool about how they could struggle to replace their star forward. arts.ttl: Liverpool’s Salah has a debt to settle with Real Madrid
arts.sum: But on Wednesday, they face the reigning European champions—Real Madrid—a team that has repeatedly dashed Mohamed Salah’s Champions League dreams. Salah’s first clash with Los Blancos came on February 17, 2016, during the Champions League Round of 16.
